testcase.name: User logs in with valid credentials - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given Open the browser and launch the application..........................passed Given the user is on the OrangeHRM login page...............................passed When the user enters username "username1" and password "password1"..........passed And clicks the login button.................................................passed Then the user should be redirected to the dashboard.........................passed And the welcome message should be displayed.................................passed

testcase.name: User logs in with valid credentials - Example #1.2

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[@class='oxd-topbar-header']' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: User logs in with invalid credentials - Example #1.1

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[@class='oxd-alert-content oxd-alert-content--error']' (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: User logs in with invalid credentials - Example #1.2
